title: dolichos tomentosus
intro: Dolichos tomentosus, also known as the hairy dolichos, is a perennial climber or a shrub in the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and diarrhea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of dolichos tomentosus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in digestion. Dolichos tomentosus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
